items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: Announcing our latest Gemini AI model
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet:
Google has been actively rolling out Gemini AI updates across its product ecosystem in early 2026. The most significant model releases include Gemini 3 (the flagship model), Gemini 3 Flash (optimized for speed and cost efficiency), Gemini 3.1 Pro (an upgraded reasoning model), and Gemini 3 Deep Think (a specialized reasoning mode for science and research, available to Ultra subscribers and select API partners). These models power a sweeping integration across Google's core products.

On the prod

items.title: Release notes | Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet:
The Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026, with Google releasing several new models in the Gemini 3 series. Key model launches include Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview (the first Flash-Lite in the Gemini 3 family), Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, and Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview. A notable deprecation occurred on March 9, 2026, when the original Gemini 3 Pro Preview was discontinued and replaced by the 3.1 Pro Preview.

On the features side, Google launched a Built-in Tools and Function Calli

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro on Gemini CLI, Gemini Enterprise, and Vertex AI | Google Cloud Blog
items.author: cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Google Cloud has made several major Gemini AI announcements in early 2026. Most notably, Google introduced Gemini 3.1 Pro, a next-generation reasoning model available in preview on Vertex AI and Gemini Enterprise. The model is positioned as a significantly smarter baseline for complex problem-solving, building on the Gemini 3 series architecture. Alongside this, Google launched Gemini Enterprise, a new enterprise-tier offering designed to bring advanced Gemini capabilities to business customers

items.title: Gemini Deep Think: Redefining the Future of Scientific Research — Google DeepMind
items.author: deepmind.google
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been active on multiple research fronts in early 2026. A major highlight is Gemini Deep Think for scientific discovery — DeepMind published two papers demonstrating AI-driven mathematical breakthroughs: one paper (Feng26) was generated entirely by AI without human intervention, calculating eigenweights (structure constants in arithmetic geometry), while another (LeeSeo26) demonstrated human-AI collaboration in proving bounds on independent sets in particle systems. These repr

items.title: Introducing the new full-stack vibe coding experience in Google AI Studio
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet: Google Antigravity, Google's new agentic development platform, has received several notable updates in early 2026. The platform combines an AI-powered coding environment with an agent-first interface, enabling developers to spawn, orchestrate, and observe multiple autonomous agents working asynchronously. A recent update (v1.20.3, released 2026-03-05) was posted to the Google AI Developers Forum, and the platform has been highlighted at events like Agent Factory alongside Gemini 3 and AI Studio.

items.title: Imagen 4 | Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Imagen 4 is Google's latest image generation model, available through both the Gemini API (ai.google.dev) and Vertex AI (cloud.google.com). The Gemini API provides access via the `imagen-4.0-generate-preview` model identifier using the Google GenAI Python SDK (`google-genai`), where you call `client.models.generate_images()` with a text prompt and optionally specify aspect ratio, number of images, and safety filter level. The API returns base64-encoded PNG images that can be decoded and saved lo

items.title: Get started with Genkit | Genkit
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Google's Genkit is an open-source AI development framework available for JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python. The Firebase documentation site hosts comprehensive guides covering everything from initial setup (installing packages, configuring API keys, creating flows) to advanced topics like RAG pipelines, structured output, streaming, and multimodal input/output. Genkit provides a unified interface for working with multiple AI model providers including Gemini (with a generous free tier), Verte

items.title: Releases · google-gemini/gemini-cli
items.author: github.com
items.snippet:
The google-gemini GitHub organization has been actively releasing updates in early 2026. The most notable recent activity centers on the gemini-cli repository, which received multiple release note updates for January 13, 2026, and has active Google Summer of Code 2026 discussions underway. The gemini-cli project is a rapidly evolving CLI tool for interacting with Gemini models, with continuous commits and CI runs visible in the public action history.

On the model side, Gemini 3.1 Pro and Gemini

items.title: firebase/genkit: Open-source framework for building AI-powered apps
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: Genkit is an open-source AI framework built by Google (under the Firebase umbrella) designed for building full-stack AI-powered applications using familiar code-centric patterns in JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python. It provides a unified interface for integrating models from providers like Google (Gemini), OpenAI, Anthropic, and Ollama, and includes a CLI and Developer UI for rapidly testing, evaluating, and iterating on AI features. Key primitives include flows (typed, observable AI pipelin

items.title: Build apps in Google AI Studio | Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Google AI Studio has launched a full-stack 'vibe coding' experience powered by its Antigravity Agent, enabling users to build complete web applications from natural language prompts. By default, it scaffolds a React frontend with a Node.js backend, supports npm packages, and handles secure server-side API calls. The platform automatically provisions Firebase services — including Firestore for persistent storage and Firebase Authentication for sign-in flows — without any manual configuration. Use

items.title: Firebase Studio
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Firebase Studio is Google's agentic cloud-based development environment that unifies Project IDX with Gemini AI assistance, enabling full-stack app development without local setup. It supports multiple entry points: importing from GitHub/GitLab, using pre-built templates, or prototyping directly via natural language prompts without writing code. For game development, Firebase Studio integrates with Firebase's broader games platform, which provides backend services, analytics, and AI capabilities

items.author: x.com
items.snippet: On March 24-25, 2026, Google DeepMind's most significant announcement was a new partnership with Agile Robots, integrating DeepMind's Gemini Robotics foundation models into Agile Robots' industrial hardware. The collaboration will deploy AI-powered automation across electronics manufacturing, automotive, data centers, and logistics sectors, with robot-collected data feeding back into Gemini AI model improvements. items.title: Function calling with the Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet: The Gemini API provides two primary mechanisms for obtaining structured data from models: Function Calling and Structured Outputs. Function Calling allows the model to perform intermediate steps by connecting to external tools, APIs, or data systems — the model generates a structured function call object that the developer executes and feeds back into the model. Structured Outputs, by contrast, constrains the model's final response to adhere to a provided JSON Schema, ensuring type-safe, predict

items.snippet: Imagen 4 is Google's latest image generation model, available through both the Gemini API (ai.google.dev) and Vertex AI (cloud.google.com). The Gemini API provides access via the `imagen-4.0-generate-preview` model identifier using the Google GenAI Python SDK (`google-genai`), where you call `client.models.generate_images()` with a text prompt and optionally specify aspect ratio, number of images, and safety filter level. The API returns base64-encoded PNG images that can be decoded and saved lo

items.title: Deploy with Firebase | Genkit
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Genkit is an open-source AI framework built by Google (under the Firebase umbrella) designed for building full-stack AI-powered applications using familiar code-centric patterns in JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python. It provides a unified interface for integrating models from providers like Google (Gemini), OpenAI, Anthropic, and Ollama, and includes a CLI and Developer UI for rapidly testing, evaluating, and iterating on AI features. Key primitives include flows (typed, observable AI pipelin

items.title: Get Started with Firebase Studio | Firebase Codelabs
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Firebase Studio is Google's agentic cloud-based development environment that unifies Project IDX with Gemini AI assistance, enabling full-stack app development without local setup. It supports multiple entry points: importing from GitHub/GitLab, using pre-built templates, or prototyping directly via natural language prompts without writing code. For game development, Firebase Studio integrates with Firebase's broader games platform, which provides backend services, analytics, and AI capabilities

items.title: Gemini Developer API pricing | Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet:
The Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026, with Google releasing several new models in the Gemini 3 series. Key model launches include Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview (the first Flash-Lite in the Gemini 3 family), Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, and Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview. A notable deprecation occurred on March 9, 2026, when the original Gemini 3 Pro Preview was discontinued and replaced by the 3.1 Pro Preview.

On the features side, Google launched a Built-in Tools and Function Calli

items.title: Chat with a PDF file | Genkit
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Google's Genkit is an open-source AI development framework available for JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python. The Firebase documentation site hosts comprehensive guides covering everything from initial setup (installing packages, configuring API keys, creating flows) to advanced topics like RAG pipelines, structured output, streaming, and multimodal input/output. Genkit provides a unified interface for working with multiple AI model providers including Gemini (with a generous free tier), Verte

items.title: google-gemini · GitHub
items.author: github.com
items.snippet:
The google-gemini GitHub organization has been actively releasing updates in early 2026. The most notable recent activity centers on the gemini-cli repository, which received multiple release note updates for January 13, 2026, and has active Google Summer of Code 2026 discussions underway. The gemini-cli project is a rapidly evolving CLI tool for interacting with Gemini models, with continuous commits and CI runs visible in the public action history.

On the model side, Gemini 3.1 Pro and Gemini

items.title: Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers now have higher rate limits for Google Antigravity
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet: Google Antigravity, Google's new agentic development platform, has received several notable updates in early 2026. The platform combines an AI-powered coding environment with an agent-first interface, enabling developers to spawn, orchestrate, and observe multiple autonomous agents working asynchronously. A recent update (v1.20.3, released 2026-03-05) was posted to the Google AI Developers Forum, and the platform has been highlighted at events like Agent Factory alongside Gemini 3 and AI Studio.

items.title: Extract structured data using function calling - Gemini API
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet: The Gemini API provides two primary mechanisms for obtaining structured data from models: Function Calling and Structured Outputs. Function Calling allows the model to perform intermediate steps by connecting to external tools, APIs, or data systems — the model generates a structured function call object that the developer executes and feeds back into the model. Structured Outputs, by contrast, constrains the model's final response to adhere to a provided JSON Schema, ensuring type-safe, predict

items.title: Google AI Studio claims to have a full stack vibe coding experience now.
items.author: medium.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio has launched a full-stack 'vibe coding' experience powered by its Antigravity Agent, enabling users to build complete web applications from natural language prompts. By default, it scaffolds a React frontend with a Node.js backend, supports npm packages, and handles secure server-side API calls. The platform automatically provisions Firebase services — including Firestore for persistent storage and Firebase Authentication for sign-in flows — without any manual configuration. Use

items.title: Agile Robots becomes the latest robotics company to partner with Google DeepMind | TechCrunch
items.author: techcrunch.com
items.snippet: On March 24-25, 2026, Google DeepMind's most significant announcement was a new partnership with Agile Robots, integrating DeepMind's Gemini Robotics foundation models into Agile Robots' industrial hardware. The collaboration will deploy AI-powered automation across electronics manufacturing, automotive, data centers, and logistics sectors, with robot-collected data feeding back into Gemini AI model improvements. items.title: Google shares Gemini updates to Docs, Sheets, Slides and Drive
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet:
Google has been actively rolling out Gemini AI updates across its product ecosystem in early 2026. The most significant model releases include Gemini 3 (the flagship model), Gemini 3 Flash (optimized for speed and cost efficiency), Gemini 3.1 Pro (an upgraded reasoning model), and Gemini 3 Deep Think (a specialized reasoning mode for science and research, available to Ultra subscribers and select API partners). These models power a sweeping integration across Google's core products.

items.title: Gemini for Government: Build custom AI agents for unclassified work on GenAI.mil | Google Cloud Blog
items.author: cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Google Cloud has made several major Gemini AI announcements in early 2026. Most notably, Google introduced Gemini 3.1 Pro, a next-generation reasoning model available in preview on Vertex AI and Gemini Enterprise. The model is positioned as a significantly smarter baseline for complex problem-solving, building on the Gemini 3 series architecture. Alongside this, Google launched Gemini Enterprise, a new enterprise-tier offering designed to bring advanced Gemini capabilities to business customers

items.author: deepmind.google
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been active on multiple research fronts in early 2026. A major highlight is Gemini Deep Think for scientific discovery — DeepMind published two papers demonstrating AI-driven mathematical breakthroughs: one paper (Feng26) was generated entirely by AI without human intervention, calculating eigenweights (structure constants in arithmetic geometry), while another (LeeSeo26) demonstrated human-AI collaboration in proving bounds on independent sets in particle systems.
